texto: We are not past racism. It took us 500 and however many years to get us where we are; it's not gonna change in one day or in one election. We made a step maybe, which they'll try and take away from us as soon as they can. But I mean what the fuck is the Tea Party about? It's not about "tea"; it ain't about "trans", either.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Bo Brown que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “We are not past racism. It took us 500 and however many years to get us where we are; it's not go…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, racism, about, com foco em mudanca e reflexao.
